creator: fidaj@ukr.net
text:
=D0=92 Tue, 29 Jun 2010 12:54:02 -0400
"Mikhail T." <mi+thun@aldan.algebra.com> =D0=BF=D0=B8=D1=88=D0=B5=D1=82:

> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/147274
>=20
> Attached is the modified version of the patch. As with cairo-dock, I=20
> changed the PORTVERSION to 2.1.3.9. I also declare USE_DOS2UNIX,
> because some of the sources now contain DOS' EOL symbols.
>=20
> I added an explicit run-dependency on wget, because some of the
> plugins use it to submit data via HTTP POST. Other plugins use curl,
> which is brought in implicitly by the etpan dependency. (It would be
> nice, if the wget-users were converted to curl, so we could reduce
> the number of dependencies here. Seems like the conversion is already
> happening upstream, though.)
>=20
> Ivan, if you approve (and miwi@ does not object), I can commit the=20
> upgrades to both cairo-dock ports for you.
>=20
> Thanks! Yours,
>=20
>     -mi
>=20

Yes, of course! I do not mind. :)

Thanks! Yours,
